# Return Window

At Acme Shop, customers have a 30-day return window from the date of delivery to return items for a refund or exchange. To qualify, items must be unused, in original condition, and include all tags and packaging. Returns can be initiated through the Returns Center on the website, where customers will receive a prepaid return shipping label. While most return shipping costs are covered, oversized items or items from international locations may incur fees. Certain items, including perishable and customized goods, are not eligible for returns, and refunds for returned items are processed within 7–10 business days.

[Source: returns_policy.md#return-window]
